headline: Over 100 Production Ready Templates for AI Agents
lede: Stop rewriting basic scaffolding and start deploying production-grade systems immediately. This repository provides modular blueprints for everything from RAG pipelines to multi-agent orchestrations.

headline: Codifying Engineering Expertise for AI Assistants
lede: Move beyond basic code generation by injecting strict engineering methodologies directly into your AI workflow. These composable skills ensure your agent adheres to TDD, architectural refinement, and precise requirement alignment.

headline: Guardrails Against Catastrophic AI Shell Commands
lede: Autonomous agents require a safety net before executing commands that could wipe your local environment. This high-performance filter intercepts dangerous instructions at sub-millisecond latency to prevent irreversible data loss.

headline: Modernizing Video Editing Through Open Source Architecture
lede: The next generation of creative tools requires a plugin-first philosophy and high-performance Rust core. OpenCut brings professional editing capabilities to the browser and desktop with native support for AI-integrated automation.

headline: Simulating Market Philosophies with Autonomous Agents
lede: Can a team of AI models replicate the strategic nuance of legendary investors? This sandbox framework lets you stress-test financial hypotheses by pitting specialized agents against live market data.

headline: Defeating Generated Slop with Custom Design DNA
lede: Break free from the predictable patterns of standard AI outputs with a rigid design-critique pipeline. This tool forces unique macrostructures onto your generated code, ensuring a distinct visual fingerprint for every build.

headline: Streamlining The Algorithmic Trading Research Cycle
lede: Bridge the gap between raw market data and validated strategy execution with an agentic research autopilot. This modular platform ensures integrity across backtesting flows to maintain reliable performance attribution.

headline: Strip Bloatware and Telemetry from Modern Windows
lede: Take back control of your local environment by purging intrusive background processes and unwanted AI services. This modular script automates complex registry cleanup for a leaner, more private operating system.

headline: Structuring Multilingual Fitness Data for Application Development
lede: Build health-focused applications faster using this comprehensive, standardized dataset of over thirteen hundred exercises. It provides the essential schema and metadata needed to power global, accessible wellness platforms.

headline: Bridging Design and Development with Open Standards
lede: Stop wrestling with proprietary hand-offs and embrace a platform built directly on web standards. Penpot offers enterprise-grade collaboration with the flexibility to self-host and customize your design-to-code workflow.
